narrative:
Precinct Avon City 1-D (precinct in Lorain County) has 557 registered voters, with 56.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.2%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.9 percentage points.
